notes: v0.16.60 hotfix — boot black-screen after the Grindare splash (regression introduced in v0.16.58). game.gd already had pulse_tex / surge_tex preloaded for the P1 / S3 draws; my v0.16.58 commit added a duplicate set of preloads, which is a parse error in GDScript. Godot dropped the script and main.tscn rendered with no logic. Removed the duplicate decls; the existing pulse.png / surge.png on disk are the new Leonardo art so the topbar still shows the new icons. Windows only.
